name: Tania Sofia
role: Casual BBQ · Date TBD · 25 guests · Hudson NH

handling.tone: Low-stakes casual prospect. She said 'just a BBQ' — meet her there. Don't pitch wedding-grade churrasco. Stale, no firm date.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: unfussy, brief, simple options. Don't oversell. References prior inbound she sent ('I'm not sure if I did?...').
handling.context: Inbound Apr 15 from FB Lead Form. 25 guests, no firm date, casual home BBQ. $788 ballpark = drop-off territory. Stale (no response in days). Light re-engagement appropriate.

context_anchors: Hudson NH, 03051 — Southern NH, MA-NH border, ~30 mi from us
'Just a BBQ' — her own informal phrasing

lead.source: FB Lead Form — VIDEO RODS WEDDING & FACELESS
lead.next_move: Light-touch message: lock date, choose American casual vs Brazilian BBQ upgrade, drop-off vs hosted

enrichment.identity_notes: Tania = multicultural name (Slavic, Latin American, Eastern European, Brazilian). Sofia as last name unusual; possibly first-and-middle pattern (form only captured first/middle). 'Just a BBQ' framing = casual exploration, not serious buyer.
win_angles: Don't oversell — meet her where she said she is
Brazilian BBQ as possible upgrade — frame as small upgrade, ask first
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hey Tania — quick check-in. For BBQ for 25 people, three quick questions: (1) Locked a date, or still flexible? (2) Classic American BBQ (burgers/dogs/sides), or open to Brazilian BBQ option (we grill on-site)? (3) Drop-off, or our team there?'
Frame: 'Family thing, friends, work? Helps me right-size.'
Anchor: 'For 25: drop-off ($X), light buffet ($Y), full hosted Brazilian BBQ with team grilling live ($Z). Last one's a step up but pretty memorable.'
open_gaps: Cuisine — American casual vs Brazilian BBQ
enrichment.strategic_note: Casual-tier prospect, not flagship. One warm light-touch message offering choice between American casual and Brazilian BBQ upgrade. If American: $625-875. If Brazilian: ~$1,000-1,200. Either fine. Don't try to upsell to wedding tier — meet her where she said.

comms.summary: Re-engagement referencing prior inbound from another channel

notes: Brazilian BBQ upgrade pitch worth trying
